description_long: A round pizza with a golden-brown thin crust sits inside a partially open, square cardboard pizza box. The pizza is topped with visible slices of pepperoni and a generous layer of melted cheese, with some areas showing a blend of yellow and orange hues. The box is made of light brown corrugated cardboard with a plain, unmarked silver-gray lid. The pizza appears to be pre-sliced into several triangular pieces, and the interior of the box is clean and unadorned. The overall presentation is typical of a takeout pizza, suitable for delivery or casual dining in an urban environment. No branding or additional packaging elements are visible on the box.
description: A pepperoni and cheese pizza in a plain, partially open cardboard box with a thin golden crust and no visible branding.
description_view_0: The pizza is visible inside a partially open box, showing the toppings and crust clearly from an angled front-left perspective.
description_view_1: The box is fully closed, with only the plain silver-gray lid and brown sides visible, concealing the pizza inside.
description_view_2: The pizza is visible from a partially open box at a front-right angle, highlighting the toppings and the box's interior.
description_view_3: A direct front view of the open box, fully displaying the pizza and its toppings inside the box.
